desc: Runs a clash/interference check on the current selection or a provided set of element IDs.
summary: Runs a clash/interference check on the current selection or a provided set of element IDs. Delegates to CheckClashes.GetAll for the actual intersection logic. By default writes results to .mepbridge/qa/results_*.xml for the QA Manager. When outputMode=json is passed, returns lightweight JSON instead (MCP path).
usecase: User wants to find clashing MEP elements in the current model. User wants to verify no interferences exist after routing changes. AI needs clash data to suggest resolution strategies.
notfor: Clashes against linked models (use CheckClashesLinkedCommand). Resolving clashes automatically (use separate resolution commands).
precondition: Active document must be open. Either elements must be selected or elementIds parameter provided.
postcondition: Default: QA XML written beside the RVT and JSON summary in LastQueryResult. JSON mode: clash pairs with overlap bounds in LastQueryResult (no XML written).

config_inputs.name: elementIds
config_inputs.description: Optional JSON array of element IDs to check

config_inputs.name: outputMode
config_inputs.description: Output mode: 'xml' writes QA XML (default), 'json' returns lightweight JSON only

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Clash pairs with overlap bounds, or QA XML summary

preprompts: Running clash check on the selected elements...
